name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: operator removes a bundled source by adding a `disable: true` marker rather than deleting; aggregator skips disabled bundled sources but they remain in audit
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: google-tsguide\n  disable: true\n" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" && grep -E "id: google-tsguide" merged.yaml -A 5 | grep "disable: true" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
